implementation_log: Added a new `strategy-improve-report` CLI workflow in `src/tw_quant/runner.py` with deterministic sample-plan generation, Step0 selection defaults (`--workers 20`, `--missing-history-threshold 0.2`), one-month-forward return evaluation, four-bucket classification, grouped stock-report artifact generation under `artifacts/Stratage_improve/<strategy>/`, and manifest/summary CSV outputs. Refactored parser creation into `_build_argument_parser()` so CLI defaults can be tested directly, added helper coverage in `tests/test_tw_quant_runner_params.py`, and added a new end-to-end artifact test in `tests/test_tw_quant_runner_strategy_improve_report.py`.
summary: Implementation is complete and ready for QA validation.
next_action: Send the approved spec and implementation evidence to QA.
